scope: real Electron dev-app MiMo V2.5 JANG_2L Chat Completions built-in tool follow-up proof

source_change_under_proof.behavior: Chat Completions tool-result follow-up requests suppress the original explicit single-tool tool_choice after a tool call has already executed.

details: The first requested sentinel REAL_UI_LIVE_TOOL_ONE was mutated to REAL_UI_LAND_TOOL_ONE.
The second requested sentinel REAL_UI_LIVE_TOOL_TWO was mutated to REAL_UI_LAND_TOOL_TWO.
The requested configured working-directory files were not created; MiMo wrote /tmp/real_ui_land_tool_one.txt and /tmp/real_ui_land_tool_two.txt instead.
The harness therefore failed with: requested real built-in tools but proof did not record long_tool_loop surface.

release_boundary: This reduces the panel Chat Completions follow-up tool_choice failure class without faking tool calls or rewriting arguments.
MiMo JANG_2L dev-app tool exactness remains red and is not checkpoint-release green for agentic tool loops.
Do not chase cache/L2 for this row; the remaining blocker is model/runtime/artifact decode or tool-argument exactness.
